title: 6 entities missing audit fields
description: Contract, Enrollment, Lesson, LessonAttendance, LessonChangeRequest, TeacherAssignment missing createdAt/updatedAt/createdBy/updatedBy columns.
reason: Entities were created before the audit field standard was established
impact: No audit trail for 6 of 8 Teaching entities. Cannot track who changed what.
estimatedCost: 1 day — TypeORM migration + entity updates + test updates
